title: Homemade Coleslaw
instructions:
In a small mixing bowl whisk together the Miracle Whip, vegetable oil, sugar, vinegar, salt and poppy seeds. Set aside.
In a medium bowl combine the coleslaw mix and the onion and toss. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Add half of the dressing and refrigerate for several hours. The coleslaw will become too soupy if you add all the dressing before you refrigerate. Add more dressing if desired after refrigeration. (we prefer a dryer coleslaw)
